maps.name: Old Cemetery
maps.description: A crumbling graveyard on the outskirts of town, thick with fog and the stench of decay.

maps.name: Town Square
maps.description: The bustling heart of the town, where merchants hawk their wares and guards keep an uneasy peace.

maps.name: The Colosseum
maps.description: A grand arena ringed with tiered stone seating, where crowds once roared for blood and glory.

maps.name: Venonan Chapel
maps.description: A weathered chapel of grey stone outside Venonan, its bells long silenced by neglect.

maps.name: Perrow Tavern
maps.description: A boisterous tavern in the center of Perrow, smelling of pipe smoke and spilled ale.

maps.name: Dock Tavern
maps.description: A salt-stained tavern down by the docks, where sailors and smugglers nurse cheap drinks.

maps.name: Don Manor
maps.description: An imposing manor house that serves as the seat of the local Don, ringed by guards and rumor.

maps.name: Minschaleft University
maps.description: A sprawling university whose halls have lately grown unsettlingly quiet.

maps.name: Eeler Floor Two
maps.description: The second floor of the Eeler, dim and close, with low ceilings that swallow sound.

maps.name: Skarsgaard Throne Hall
maps.description: Dummy placeholder map (King in the North quest target). Real map assets pending.

maps.name: Southron's Mill
maps.description: Dummy placeholder map (Southron's Mill quest target). Real map assets pending.

maps.name: Vermincelli Hideout
maps.description: Dummy placeholder map (Rats Hostage Sausage quest target). Real map assets pending.

maps.name: The Sacred Grove
maps.description: Dummy placeholder map (Sacred Grove quest target). Real map assets pending.

maps.name: Bortelinian Catacombs
maps.description: Dummy placeholder map (Last Laugh quest target). Real map assets pending.

maps.name: Alamonean Magician's Tower
maps.description: Dummy placeholder map (Last Laugh quest target). Real map assets pending.

maps.name: River-Elf Village
maps.description: Dummy placeholder map (From the River to the See quest target). Real map assets pending.

maps.name: The Scarlattin Curia
maps.description: Dummy placeholder map (Quest for Quorum target). Real map assets pending.

maps.name: Scarlatti
maps.description: The known world. Move the party banner across plains, forests, mountains, and waters; settlements reveal warp points as you approach.

maps.name: Argentiara Square
maps.description: The dusty heart of the mining town, where ore-carts rattle past the assayer's office and miners trade silver for bread and drink.

maps.name: Argentiara Mine
maps.description: The mouth of the great silver mine. Timbered galleries swallow the lantern light, and the rock face waits for any back strong enough to work it.

maps.name: Argentiara Deep Shaft
maps.description: The lowest worked level of the mine, hot and close, where the richest seams run — and where the rock is most apt to come down on the unwary.

maps.name: River Stronghold
maps.description: A riverside stone stronghold half-claimed by the bullywug swamp, its walls rising from reed-choked black water.

maps.name: Heart of the Village
maps.description: The old heart of the village, its square and cottages slowly sinking into a misty swamp graveyard.

warp_points.label: To Ages of the Vale Tavern

maps.name: Ages of the Vale Tavern
maps.description: A timber tavern raised on stilts over the swampy shallows, linked by creaking boardwalks across dark water.

maps.name: Village Market
maps.description: A walled village market edged by encroaching bog, its stalls set on raised planking above muddy channels.

maps.name: Adventurers' Guild
maps.description: A guildhall on the rim of a fog-laden swamp graveyard, where the courtyard gives way to mossy tombs and still water.

maps.name: The Eeler's Tavern
maps.description: A dockside eel-fishers' tavern over brackish swamp water, hung with traps and nets along weathered jetties.

warp_points.label: To Ages of the Vale Tavern

maps.name: Goblin Forest Fortress
maps.description: A ramshackle goblin fortress lashed together among the tangled roots and channels of a flooded mangrove forest.

maps.name: Mangrove Forest Pass
maps.description: A winding trail of raised paths and footbridges threading through dense, tidal mangrove woodland.

maps.name: Bortellini Amphitheatre
maps.description: A grand stone amphitheatre on the banks of the tidal river, its tiered seating descending toward the water.

maps.name: Royal Stables
maps.description: Royal riverside stables, their paddocks and yards opening onto the broad tidal riverbank.

maps.name: Adventurers' Guild
maps.description: A guildhall on the tidal riverfront, its courtyard meeting stone quays along the flowing water.

maps.name: Bortellini Hippodrome
maps.description: A great chariot hippodrome running alongside the tidal river, its long oval track parallel to the bank.

maps.name: Training Camp
maps.description: A military training camp on the tidal riverbank, its sparring yards and drill grounds beside the water.

maps.name: Bortellini City Market
maps.description: A bustling walled market beside the tidal river, its quays and stalls lining the busy waterfront.

maps.name: Floating Market
maps.description: A floating market of boats and pontoons drifting among lush druidic islands, walkways linking the verdant islets.

maps.name: Black Market Streets
maps.description: A shadowy black-market quarter strung across small druid islands, its alleys and bridges spanning overgrown channels.

maps.name: Adventurers' Guild
maps.description: A guildhall on a lush druid island, ringed by water, standing stones, and ancient trees.

maps.name: Royal Mine Town
maps.description: A royal silver-mining town carved into rocky dragon-memorial highlands, its ore-works clustered among weathered monuments.

maps.name: Frontier Town
maps.description: A dusty frontier mining town in rocky badlands, a wide main street flanked by timber buildings beneath stone outcrops.

maps.name: Lighthouse
maps.description: A rugged coastal lighthouse on a rocky isle within a sheltered harpy cove, its tower rising over tide-washed rocks.
